Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a DECLARE model for a loan application process Our goal is to add constraints that mitigate potential bias based on sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace We must ensure fairness by adding constraints that for example require manual reviews for decisions involving sensitive groups or prevent direct succession from sensitive attribute checks to decisions without a bias mitigation step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to add constraints to the given model The given model has constraints for existence init coexistence response and succession Well add new constraints to address bias

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We might have activities like CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender that expose sensitive attributes Decision activities Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision We might have a ManualReview activity to ensure fairness We might have a BiasMitigationCheck activity

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Since the exact activities are not specified we will assume some typical activities CheckSensitiveAttributes or separate checks for race age gender ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck However the initial model does not contain these so we might need to add them as activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets assume we add the following activities for bias mitigation ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck And we assume there are activities that check sensitive attributes these might be part of the process but not in the initial model Well add CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each sensitive attribute check activity we might want to ensure that if it occurs then a manual review must occur coexistence This ensures that for applicants with sensitive attributes a manual review is performed

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: To prevent immediate biased decisions we can add non succession constraints from a sensitive attribute check to a decision like Reject or add succession constraints that require a bias mitigation step in between

Name: Validation - IND
Text: We want to ensure that when a sensitive attribute is checked a bias mitigation step occurs before any decision

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: A better approach Use coexistence between sensitive check and manual review That would require that if sensitive check occurs then manual review occurs and if manual review occurs then sensitive check must have occurred The latter might not be desired So maybe responded existence if sensitive check occurs then manual review occurs but not vice versa

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets use responded existence for each sensitive attribute check add responded existence from the sensitive check to ManualReview

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: And then to ensure that the decision does not happen immediately after the sensitive check we can add non chainsuccession from the sensitive check to FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will add response from each sensitive attribute check to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: To ensure that the bias mitigation check occurs before the decision we can add a precedence constraint from FinalDecision to BiasMitigationCheck but that would require a bias mitigation check for every final decision even without sensitive checks That might be acceptable if we want to ensure every decision goes through a bias check to ensure fairness overall

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the problem says limit the process bias we might want to enforce that every decision goes through a bias check to ensure fairness overall So well add precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So if sensitive check occurs then BiasMitigationCheck must occur eventually and BiasMitigationCheck must occur before FinalDecision So that ensures that if sensitive check occurs then BiasMitigationCheck occurs before FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list the new constraints we will add For each sensitive attribute check in CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender responded existence to ManualReview response to BiasMitigationCheck nonchainsuccession to FinalDecision Also add precedence BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must be careful with the structure The dictionary structure for binary constraints is nested response maps an activity to another activity with support and confidence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For responded existence we add for each sensitive check an entry in responded existence For response we add for each sensitive check an entry in response For nonchainsuccession we add for each sensitive check an entry in nonchainsuccession For precedence we add an entry for BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must keep the existing constraints intact
